title: Seeking Co-Developer for Reinforcement Learning Trading Strategy
author: traderJPL
selftext:
My RL trading strategy is up +86% since Sept 30 (trading market close signals). 

Currently trying to implement the methods from this paper to optimize it further: https://www.mdpi.com/2227-7390/12/24/4020. Having some trouble getting it work.

Anyone want to team up and solve this? #RL #Algotrading #Python

comments.author: AdMuch9627
comments.body: This looks interesting, I can work on this. What instruments are you testing for this strategy? Have you already completed the coding? Are you planning to implement LLM model for this strategy?

replies.author: traderJPL
replies.body: I’ve tested this across several instruments and have the codebase ready. The immediate plan is to get the current code fully operational, then focus on extending it, with potential sentiment analysis features down the line. I’d love to collaborate on GitHub—please message me your username so I can add you.

replies.author: AdMuch9627
replies.body: I have DM you my github usrename

comments.author: Environmental_Two581
comments.body:
What is this based on and are you trading with real money for that 86% what do you think is the potential 

I have e a team of engineers and building agents for clients but wanted to do this too happy to chat and see if we have synergy

replies.author: traderJPL
replies.body:
I’m currently live-trading TQQQ and paper-trading SOXL to test a reinforcement learning-based algorithmic trading system. After reviewing hundreds of papers and implementation examples, I am well-versed in the common pitfalls of RL in finance.

While I know the limitations of my current model, I have a comprehensive roadmap for improvements. Looking to connect with fellow researchers or traders working in this space. Please message me.
